title: Attendance: Attendance Enforcement
description: Conroe ISD's attendance enforcement policy explains what happens when a student misses too much school and how the district works with families to address ongoing absences. It outlines the steps the district takes, including working with parents and, if necessary, involving local authorities or the court system, to help students stay on track. Regular attendance is important for student success, and this policy reflects the district's commitment to keeping students in school.
